name: Seismic Shift
description: Seismic's annual conference for enablement professionals. Covers content management, buyer engagement, analytics, and AI-powered enablement strategies.

name: Highspot Spark
description: Highspot's user conference focused on enablement excellence. Sessions on content strategy, sales training, rep productivity, and enablement ROI measurement.

name: Sales Enablement Summit
description: Global summit series for sales enablement professionals. Covers enablement strategy, organizational design, metrics, and career development for practitioners.

name: ATD Conference
description: The largest learning and development conference globally. Relevant for enablement professionals focused on training design, adult learning, and capability building.

name: TSIA World
description: Covers post-sale enablement, customer education, and service delivery. Research-backed frameworks for building enablement programs that scale across the customer lifecycle.

name: Revenue Enablement Society Summit
description: Community-led summit for revenue enablement practitioners. Covers the shift from sales enablement to revenue enablement, cross-functional alignment, and impact measurement.

name: Gartner CSO & Sales Leader Conference
description: Gartner's premier sales leadership event. Covers sales enablement trends, AI in selling, buyer engagement, and research-backed enablement frameworks.

name: SalesHood Summit
description: Focused on sales enablement and coaching. Covers onboarding programs, continuous learning, coaching frameworks, and enablement technology adoption.

name: Dreamforce (Enablement Track)
description: Salesforce's flagship conference with dedicated enablement sessions. Covers Salesforce-native enablement tools, CRM adoption, and sales productivity optimization.

name: SaaStr Annual
description: The largest SaaS conference with growing enablement content. Covers SaaS sales motions, rep productivity, onboarding at scale, and enablement in high-growth environments.

name: Pavilion CRO Summit
description: Pavilion's revenue leadership summit. Covers the enablement function from the CRO perspective, including team structure, budget allocation, and strategic alignment.

name: SEC Conference
description: Sales Enablement Collective's practitioner conference. Focused on tactical enablement execution, peer networking, and sharing what works in the field.
